markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Content refreshes are highly effective (e.g., `open source CMS` refresh saw +144% sessions), while niche integration pages outperform flagship topics due to AI search cannibalizing clicks on broad queries.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Scale content refreshes and prioritize niche integration topics (e.g., emerging frameworks, hosting providers) to capture high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Operations:** The sync cadence shifts to bi-weekly, freeing up meeting time for strategy. Theo will implement an Airtable webhook to automate tracking and improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Content Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [**Performance:** Driving \~70k organic/referral sessions (+45% QoQ).](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [**High-Impact Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [`best JavaScript frameworks`: +48% sessions, +42% engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [`open source CMS platforms`: +144% sessions, +173.5% engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with Google's preference for fresh content and captures AI search citations.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Performance:** Niche pages outperform flagship topics.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI Overviews cannibalize clicks on broad queries, while niche topics retain high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [**Action:** Prioritize emerging tools and hosting providers.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
          - [**Examples:** Clerk, Coolify, Railway.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
          - [**Note:** `Auth0` is a duplicate of `Okta` and should be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Status:** Strapi leads competitors (Contentful, Sanity, Storyblock, HighGraph) with a 39% share of voice for evaluation-stage queries.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**New Tactic:** Create category-based comparison posts (e.g., "Best Hosting for Strapi") to drive cross-linking to individual integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [**Decision:** Shift to bi-weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Focus meetings on strategy and performance, with production updates handled asynchronously in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Airtable Webhook Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate content tracking in Airtable, replacing manual updates.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Theo lacked admin permissions to create the webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Victor granted Theo Super Admin access. Theo will now implement the webhook using the code and token Carrie provided.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Tooling & Partnerships:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**CheckBat:** Extended trial access for Strapi is expected this week.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**Content OS:** Victor will contact Marcel and Jason about a potential integration if the project becomes open source.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [Update Looker with all content refresh articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
      - [Add integration-related prompts to CheckBat for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [Implement the Airtable webhook using the provided code and token.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [Share the list of manually updated integration pages with Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Strapi Team (Victor, Paul, Theo):**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Add new integration candidates (e.g., Clerk, Coolify) to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - [Identify top-performing articles for refresh/update.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Victor:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
      - [Contact Marcel and Jason about a potential Content OS integration.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Meet next week, then switch to a bi-weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/5pRCVzTAM_1xr5SjqtTowBNBRUiv6Xr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
